highlights.text: I wrote at 4pm Monday (when we were 6340s): “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “The bull case though is that ES can fill it out the upside and test 6360, 6366, then 6371-74.
I wrote yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
To do that, we need a setup, and I trade 1: The Failed Breakdown.
The Failed Breakdown is how institutions accumulate; they flush lows, trap shorts, and price rallies.
When you marry the Failed Breakdown, with macro chart patterns, magic happens, and we saw that this week.

post_title: SPX Breaks Out Its Bull Triangle and Rallies 100 Points This Week. Another Leg Up Next Week, Or Pullback? July 28 Plan
